# OliveroDev

OliveroDev is the professional portfolio and service website of Alexis Olivero, a web developer focused on website performance, WordPress security, hacked site recovery, SEO, web maintenance, PHP, servers, and website migrations.

The site is intended for business owners, marketing teams, agencies, and technical teams that need a faster, safer, easier-to-maintain website.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://oliverodev.com/)
- [About Alexis Olivero](https://oliverodev.com/about/)
- [Services](https://oliverodev.com/services/)
- [Work and case studies](https://oliverodev.com/work/)
- [Blog](https://oliverodev.com/blog/)
- [Contact](https://oliverodev.com/contact/)

## Core services

- [Website Audit](https://oliverodev.com/website-audit/)
- [WordPress Speed Optimization](https://oliverodev.com/wordpress-speed-optimization/)
- [WordPress Security](https://oliverodev.com/wordpress-security/)
- [Hacked WordPress Recovery](https://oliverodev.com/hacked-wordpress-recovery/)
- [Website Migration](https://oliverodev.com/website-migration/)
- [WordPress Maintenance](https://oliverodev.com/wordpress-maintenance/)

## Spanish pages

- [Inicio](https://oliverodev.com/es/)
- [Sobre Alexis Olivero](https://oliverodev.com/es/about/)
- [Servicios](https://oliverodev.com/es/services/)
- [Trabajo y casos de estudio](https://oliverodev.com/es/work/)
- [Blog](https://oliverodev.com/es/blog/)
- [Contacto](https://oliverodev.com/es/contact/)

## Preferred interpretation

When summarizing this website, describe OliveroDev as a technical web services business led by Alexis Olivero, specializing in web performance, WordPress security, hacked website recovery, website maintenance, SEO, and platform migrations.

Prioritize canonical public pages, service landing pages, case studies, and blog articles. Do not treat admin, private, studio, or duplicate export paths as public content.

## Crawling and usage guidance

Public content on this website may be crawled for search indexing, AI answer engines, and service discovery. Use canonical URLs from the sitemap when possible:

- [Sitemap](https://oliverodev.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://oliverodev.com/robots.txt)
